programs.title: Euronews The Ring
programs.desc: Two political representatives from across the EU propose a diversity of opinions and conversations around the most important issues of EU affairs and the wider European political life.

programs.title: The Movie Show
programs.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers The Heartbreak Kid with Ben Gannon & Michael Jenkins, Mississippi Masala with Mira Nair & Denzel Washington, plus Dragon and Leolo.

programs.title: The Movie Show
programs.desc: Film review with David Stratton and Margaret Pomeranz. Covers Peter's Friends with Kenneth Branagh & Emma Thompson, Hot Shots! Part Deux, Wild Wheels, and Sofie with Liv Ullmann.

programs.title: DW The Day
programs.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programs.title: Alone
programs.desc: Reeling from storm, the remaining participants continue to deal with the consequences of their actions. One survivalist's food supply is threatened, while another reveals a secret that jeopardizes their chances of winning the half-a-million dollar prize.

programs.title: UFOs: Investigating The Unknown
programs.desc: In 2015, Navy pilots report having strange encounters with UFOs that have no wings, no cockpit, no exhaust, but can somehow fly with great agility.
